channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - RAG & Retrieval
channel.description: Latest RAG & Retrieval news in Context Engineering

item.title: AlpsBench: An LLM Personalization Benchmark for Real-Dialogue Memorization and Preference Alignment
item.description: arXiv:2603.26680v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) evolve into lifelong AI assistants, LLM personalization has become a critical frontier. However, progress is currently bottlenecked by the absence of a gold-standard evaluation benchmark. Existing benchmarks either over...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, memory, alignment, large language model, retrieval | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Resolving the Robustness-Precision Trade-off in Financial RAG through Hybrid Document-Routed Retrieval
item.description: arXiv:2603.26815v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems for financial document question answering typically follow a chunk-based paradigm: documents are split into fragments, embedded into vector space, and retrieved via similarity search. While effective in gen...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> augmented, retrieval, vector, RAG, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: The Price of Meaning: Why Every Semantic Memory System Forgets
item.description: arXiv:2603.27116v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Every major AI memory system in production today organises information by meaning. That organisation enables generalisation, analogy, and conceptual retrieval -- but it comes at a price. We prove that the same geometric structure enabling semantic gen...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, attention, augmented, memory, retrieval | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Explaining, Verifying, and Aligning Semantic Hierarchies in Vision-Language Model Embeddings
item.description: arXiv:2603.26798v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-language model (VLM) encoders such as CLIP enable strong retrieval and zero-shot classification in a shared image-text embedding space, yet the semantic organization of this space is rarely inspected. We present a post-hoc framework to explain,...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, zero-shot, vision, alignment, image | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Gaussian Joint Embeddings For Self-Supervised Representation Learning
item.description: arXiv:2603.26799v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Self-supervised representation learning often relies on deterministic predictive architectures to align context and target views in latent space. While effective in many settings, such methods are limited in genuinely multi-modal inverse problems, whe...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, context, memory, alignment, vision | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: airweave - Open-source context retrieval layer for AI agents
item.description: Open-source context retrieval layer for AI agents<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> retrieval, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: LightRAG - [EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"
item.description: [EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> retrieval, RAG, augmented | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: KAG - KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs. It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.
item.description: KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs. It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, knowledge base, retrieval, vector, RAG | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Kiln - Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.
item.description: Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> fine-tuning, RAG | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: graphrag - A modular graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system
item.description: A modular graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> retrieval, RAG, augmented | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>

item.title: R2R - SoTA production-ready AI retrieval system. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with a RESTful API.
item.description: SoTA production-ready AI retrieval system. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with a RESTful API.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> augmented, product, retrieval, RAG, API | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
